name: homebase
description: Homebase — a customizable widget-based new tab for Chrome.

scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p releases && cd dist && zip -r "../releases/homebase-v$npm_package_version.zip" . -x '*.DS_Store' -x '__MACOSX/*' && cd .. && echo "Created releases/homebase-v$npm_package_version.zip"
